items.title: Champions League: goals and action from all 18 matches in league phase finale – live
items.summary: ⚽️ All the action from across Europe. Kick-off 8pm GMT ⚽️ Live scores | Table | Permutations | Napoli v Chelsea live Napoli Meret, Di Lorenzo, Juan Jesus, Buongiorno, Spinazzola, Lobotka, McTominay, Olivera, Vergara, Elmas, Hojlund. Subs: Contini, Spinelli, Gutierrez, Lukaku, Beukema, De Chiara, Garofalo. Continue reading...

items.title: Napoli v Chelsea: Champions League – live
items.summary: ⚽️ Updates from the 8pm (GMT) kick-off in Naples ⚽️ Live scores | Full table | Clockwatch | Mail John Liam Rosenior spoke to TNT ahead of kick-off: ““It’s been a positive start. Firstly the players and their engagement and attitude and willingness to learn, I think they have enjoyed it as well. Tonight is another big test for us and if we manage to come through it , it gives us a great chance of being in the top eight.” “They are very good on transition. They are very organised in their press. From what I’ve seen they will press us really, really high, whether that is from a 3-4-3 or a 5-4-1. They have outstanding players. They build well from the back. It is going to be a difficult game and we are prepared for it.” Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Dolberg zet Ajax naast Olympiakos
items.summary: Ajax neemt het woensdagavond om 21.00 uur op tegen Olympiakos Piraeus in de Champions League. De Amsterdammers moeten zelf winnen om nog kans te maken op een plek in de tussenronde. Daarnaast zijn zij afhankelijk van de concurrentie. Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in deze VI Live. We hebben ook een speciale VI Live voor PSV - Bayern München en de overige duels in de Champions League .

items.title: VI Live: PSV heeft één goal nodig voor virtuele plek in tussenronde
items.summary: PSV speelt woensdagavond om 21.00 uur in eigen huis tegen Bayern München in de Champions League. Het lijkt er sterk op dat de huidige acht punten van de Eindhovenaren niet genoeg zijn voor een plek in de tussenronde, waardoor PSV een stunt nodig heeft. Of dat lukt, volg je in deze VI Live. Voor het duel van Ajax en de overige CL-duels hebben we aparte liveblogs.

items.title: VI Live: Liverpool op weg naar monsterscore, Benfica verrast Real Madrid
items.summary: Woensdagavond staat de laatste speelronde van de competitiefase van de Champions League op het programma. Alle 36 clubs komen in actie, verdeeld over 18 wedstrijden. Voor PSV en Ajax hebben we een apart blog. In deze VI Live volg je de verrichtingen op de andere 16 velden.

items.title: Kvara limps off adding to PSG's injury woes
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain's injury woes continued as star winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia limped off with a right leg injury against Newcastle in the Champions League on Wednesday.

items.title: Rodman coaxes dance from Hayes in USWNT rout
items.summary: Trinity Rodman capped off the USWNT's 5-0 rout of Chile by coaxing coach Emma Hayes into a sideline dance, as a young American squad secured its fifth consecutive shutout Tuesday night.

items.title: Sterling leaves Chelsea by mutual agreement
items.summary: Chelsea have announced that winger Raheem Sterling has left the club by mutual consent.

items.title: Brazil's Paquetá set for $49M move to Flamengo
items.summary: West Ham have accepted to receive Lucas Paquetá's transfer fee in 24 monthly instalments but are waiting for Flamengo to agree on the best way to divide the number of payments.

items.title: Russo rounds off Arsenal rout of AS Far in Women’s Champions Cup semi-final
items.summary: Arsenal 6-0 AS Far (Blackstenius 8, Maanum 12, Caldentey 21pen, Smith 41, Russo 66 76) Arsenal play Corinthians of Brazil in Sunday’s final A businesslike performance against AS Far earned Arsenal a place in Sunday’s final of the inaugural Fifa Women’s Champions Cup against Corinthians. Four goals in the first half – from Stina Blackstenius, Frida Maanum, Mariona Caldentey and Olivia Smith – allowed Renée Slegers to rotate players and rest some legs and the substitute Alessia Russo added two after the break to complete the rout. Continue reading...

items.title: Braga-trainer werkte bijna bij Heracles: 'Nog altijd contact'
items.summary: Go Ahead Eagles-opponent SC Braga heeft met Florian Grillitsch en Gustaf Lagerbielke twee voormalige Eredivisie-spelers in de gelederen, maar ook trainer Carlos Vicens had bijna in Nederland gewerkt. De oefenmeester zou in 2022 aan de slag gaan bij Heracles Almelo, tot de club onverwachts degradeerde.

items.title: Leemans wil transfer van NAC Breda naar Polen niet forceren
items.summary: De winterse transfermarkt is geopend. In dit blog vind je alle speculaties en bevestigde transfers in Nederland. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in het buitenland.

items.title: Luiz returns to Villa to ease midfield injury woes
items.summary: Douglas Luiz returns to Aston Villa from Juventus, following a loan spell at Nottingham Forest, to boost Unai Emery's midfield after Youri Tielemans is ruled out for 10 weeks.

items.title: Live updates: Champions League league phase final ...
items.summary: Enjoy live updates of all 18 matches of the final matchday of the league phase in the 2025-26 UEFA Champions League.

items.title: Flanagan: Leopardstown ground to be no issue for Marine Nationale
items.summary: Sean Flanagan is set to once again partner champion chaser Marine Nationale when he lines up at the Dublin Racing Festival this weekend, aiming to emulate the heroics of his Prestbury Park triumph back in March.

items.title: Stabbed Chelsea fan shocked by Naples attack
items.summary: A Chelsea supporter describes his "shock" after being stabbed and taken to hospital in Naples before the Champions League match against Napoli in Italy.

items.title: Stranraer expelled as Queen's Park handed Rangers tie
items.summary: Stranraer miss out on a major pay day against Rangers after being expelled from the Scottish Cup for fielding an ineligible player in last week's victory over Queen's Park.

items.title: Aston Villa re-sign Luiz from Juventus
items.summary: Aston Villa have re-signed midfielder Douglas Luiz on loan from Juventus.

items.title: Norris debuts 2026 McLaren as Mercedes continue to impress in Barcelona
items.summary: Mercedes' promising start to F1's new rules era appeared to continue on the third day of the Barcelona shakedown, which saw world champion Lando Norris finally debut the new McLaren on track.

items.title: Reed set for PGA Tour return after quitting LIV Golf
items.summary: Patrick Reed is set to make a return to the PGA Tour after announcing his decision to quit LIV Golf.
